productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Purple Dial Watch
description: Case style: Purple plastic round case with a fancy bezel Dial style: Purple dial with yellow and blue hands and print on the dial Strap style: Purple plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 9 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
